investigation.root_cause: assert_dataset_pass passes evaluables to assert_pass, which skips calling the runnable and evaluates dataset items directly. Dataset items have eval_output=null, so FactualityEval compares null against expected_output, yielding low scores.

bugs_found.description: Used assert_dataset_pass which passes evaluables (with eval_output=null from dataset) directly to the evaluator, bypassing the runnable entirely. The actual app was never called, so no real output was captured.
runnable discarded the return value of answer_question() (though this was secondary since the runnable was never called in the failing path)

fix_applied.approach: Replaced assert_dataset_pass with a manual loop calling run_and_evaluate per dataset item, injecting expected_output from each dataset item. This ensures the runnable is called, traces are captured, and the actual LLM output is compared against expected answers.

dataset_analysis.name: qa-golden-set
questions: What is the capital of France?
What is the boiling point of water?
